description: CompositionBright pink round neck T-shirt made of 100% certified organically grown cotton, that has ribbing around the neckline with tape detailing on the inseam, green stitch detailing on the shoulders, short sleeves, printed CBF badge on the back below collar and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine was coldWash separately with like coloursDo not use softenersRemove immediatelyDo not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleach, iron Do not dry cleanableLine dryBring home the vibrant energy of the Brazilian football team with this bright yellow T-shirt from nike. The pure cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comofrtable all day, while the zombie inspired graphic print on the front gives you an added edge. The CBF (Confederação Brasileira de Futebol) logo printed on the back of the neck is perfect if you are a dedicated football fan. Team this with jeans and sneakers for a casual look.
